flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Wisconsin-Milwaukee fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Wisconsin-Milwaukee rose 36% between 2021 and 2024 (22.5% → 30.7%).
